title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Costco India

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Costco India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Costco India in Chandigarh is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Costco India:
Costco India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Costco India!
